  area_acres decimal(12,4) [note: 'Total calculated area of the field boundary in acres, derived from the boundary geometry. Used for FSA compliance reporting, crop insurance acreage certification, input application rate calculations, and yield per acre (YPM) computations. This is the authoritative GIS-calculated area, not a surveyed or estimated value.']
  area_hectares decimal(12,4) [note: 'Total calculated area of the field boundary in hectares, derived from the boundary geometry. Used for international reporting, metric-system compliance, and integration with global agricultural standards (GLOBALG.A.P., ISO 14001 environmental reporting).']
  boundary_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known alphanumeric code uniquely identifying this field boundary within the farm management information system (FMIS). Used for cross-system referencing between ArcGIS, John Deere Operations Center, and SAP S/4HANA.']
  boundary_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name assigned to this field boundary, typically matching the field name used operationally (e.g., \'North 40\', \'River Bottom Field\'). Serves as the primary identity label for business users.']
  boundary_source varchar [note: 'Method or technology used to capture or derive this field boundary. \'RTK_GPS_survey\' indicates Real-Time Kinematic (RTK) GPS ground survey; \'drone_imagery\' indicates boundary derived from UAV aerial imagery; \'ArcGIS_digitized\' indicates manual digitization in Esri ArcGIS; \'satellite_imagery\' indicates derivation from satellite imagery; \'manual_entry\' indicates operator-entered coordinates.']
  boundary_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of this boundary version. \'active\' indicates the current operative boundary; \'superseded\' indicates a prior version replaced by a newer one; \'draft\' indicates a boundary under review before activation; \'retired\' indicates a boundary no longer in use; \'pending_review\' indicates awaiting FSA or agronomist validation.']
  boundary_version varchar [note: 'Sequential version number of this boundary record for the parent field. Increments each time the boundary is re-surveyed, split, merged, or corrected. Version 1 is the initial boundary; higher numbers represent subsequent revisions.']
  centroid_latitude decimal(10,7) [note: 'Latitude coordinate of the field boundary centroid in decimal degrees (WGS84 / EPSG:4326). Used for weather station assignment, solar radiation modeling, and quick spatial lookups without full geometry processing.']
  centroid_longitude decimal(10,7) [note: 'Longitude coordinate of the field boundary centroid in decimal degrees (WGS84 / EPSG:4326). Used alongside centroid_latitude for weather station assignment, logistics routing, and spatial indexing.']
  clu_identifier varchar [note: 'USDA Common Land Unit (CLU) unique identifier for this field boundary. The CLU is the smallest unit of land that has a permanent, contiguous boundary and is used as the basis for USDA farm program administration and acreage reporting.']
  conservation_program varchar [note: 'Name or code of the USDA conservation program in which this field boundary is enrolled (e.g., \'CRP\' for Conservation Reserve Program, \'EQIP\' for Environmental Quality Incentives Program, \'WRP\' for Wetland Reserve Program). Null if not enrolled in any conservation program.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code identifying the country in which this field boundary is located (e.g., \'USA\'). Supports international operations and GLOBALG.A.P. country-of-origin labeling (COOL) compliance.']
  county_fips_code varchar [note: 'Five-digit Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code identifying the US county in which this field boundary is located. Required for USDA FSA county office assignment, crop insurance rating, and regulatory jurisdiction determination.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this field boundary record was first created in the system, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Provides the audit trail creation anchor for data lineage and compliance reporting.']
  crs_epsg_code varchar [note: 'EPSG (European Petroleum Survey Group) numeric code identifying the coordinate reference system (CRS) in which the boundary geometry coordinates are expressed (e.g., 4326 for WGS84, 32614 for UTM Zone 14N). Critical for accurate spatial calculations and cross-system interoperability.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date on which this boundary version ceases to be operative, typically when superseded by a new version due to field split, merge, or re-survey. Null indicates the boundary is currently active with no defined end date.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date from which this boundary version is considered operative and legally binding for FSA compliance, crop insurance, and land management purposes. Marks the beginning of the temporal validity window for this boundary record.']
  elevation_avg_meters decimal(8,2) [note: 'Average elevation of the field above mean sea level in meters, derived from digital elevation model (DEM) data. Used for microclimate analysis, frost risk assessment, and precision agriculture zone delineation.']
  fsa_field_number varchar [note: 'USDA Farm Service Agency (FSA) field number within the assigned tract. Together with fsa_tract_number, uniquely identifies this field in the USDA Common Land Unit (CLU) registry for federal program compliance and acreage certification.']
  fsa_tract_number varchar [note: 'USDA Farm Service Agency (FSA) tract number assigned to this field for federal program compliance, acreage reporting, and crop insurance purposes. Required for ARC/PLC program enrollment and FSA farm records.']
  geometry_type varchar [note: 'GIS geometry type of the boundary shape as defined by ISO 19125 Simple Features. \'Polygon\' for contiguous single-parcel fields; \'MultiPolygon\' for non-contiguous fields composed of multiple disconnected parcels (e.g., fields separated by roads or waterways).']
  geometry_wkt varchar [note: 'Full boundary geometry encoded in Well-Known Text (WKT) format as per OGC standards. Stores the polygon or multipolygon coordinate ring defining the precise field boundary. Used by Esri ArcGIS and John Deere Operations Center for spatial analysis and field mapping.']
  irrigation_type varchar [note: 'Primary irrigation method applied to this field boundary. Informs water resource management planning, evapotranspiration (ET) calculations, and irrigation event scheduling in the crop management domain.']
  is_gmo_restricted boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this field boundary has a contractual or certification-based restriction prohibiting the planting of genetically modified organism (GMO) crops. True if GMO planting is prohibited; False if GMO crops are permitted.']
  is_organic_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this field boundary is enrolled in and certified under the USDA National Organic Program (NOP). True if the field carries active organic certification; False otherwise. Drives organic input restrictions and segregation requirements.']
  land_use_type varchar [note: 'Primary land use classification for this field boundary. Determines applicable regulatory requirements, conservation program eligibility, and crop planning constraints. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: cropland|pasture|orchard|vineyard|fallow|wetland|woodland|conservation|other — promote to reference product]']
  perimeter_meters decimal(12,4) [note: 'Total calculated perimeter length of the field boundary in meters, derived from the boundary geometry. Used for fencing cost estimation, irrigation system design, and field edge management planning.']
  slope_percent decimal(6,2) [note: 'Average slope of the field expressed as a percentage (rise over run × 100). Used for erosion risk assessment, drainage planning, variable rate application (VRA) prescriptions, and conservation practice eligibility under USDA NRCS programs.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two-letter US state abbreviation (ISO 3166-2:US) identifying the state in which this field boundary is located. Used for state-level regulatory compliance, FSA state office routing, and geographic reporting.']
  survey_date date [note: 'Date on which the field boundary was physically surveyed or digitized to produce this version. Used to assess boundary currency, trigger re-survey workflows, and support FSA acreage certification timelines.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to this field boundary record, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Used for change detection, incremental data pipeline processing, and audit trail maintenance.']

  Note: 'Versioned GIS boundary geometry record for each field, supporting boundary change history as fields are split, merged, or re-surveyed. Stores boundary version number, effective start date, effective end date, geometry type (polygon/multipolygon), coordinate reference system (CRS/EPSG code), boundary source (RTK GPS survey, drone imagery, ArcGIS digitized), total calculated area (acres), perimeter (feet/meters), boundary accuracy class (RTK/sub-meter/meter), ArcGIS feature class reference, and John Deere Operations Center field ID. Enables temporal boundary tracking for FSA compliance and crop insurance.'
}

Table land.conservation_practice {
  conservation_practice_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for each conservation practice record implemented on a field or parcel.']
  agrochemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.agrochemical_product. Business justification: Conservation practices (e.g., cover crop termination, buffer strip maintenance) mandate or restrict specific agrochemical products. NRCS cost-share compliance reporting and organic program eligibility']
  field_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the field or parcel on which this conservation practice is implemented, as mapped in the GIS/ArcGIS field boundary layer.']
  management_zone_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to land.management_zone. Business justification: Conservation and BMP practices (cover crops, buffer strips, drainage tile, nutrient management) are increasingly implemented at the sub-field management zone level to support variable-rate and precisi']
  parcel_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the land parcel record associated with this conservation practice, supporting ownership and lease tracking.']
  purchase_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to procurement.purchase_order. Business justification: Conservation practice installations (tile drainage, waterways, cover crop establishment) are procured via purchase orders. Linking conservation_practice to its funding PO enables NRCS cost-share recon']
  bmp_category varchar [note: 'Best Management Practice (BMP) environmental category that this conservation practice addresses: soil_health, water_quality, nutrient_management, pest_management, wildlife habitat, or carbon_sequestration. Supports environmental stewardship reporting.']
  carbon_credit_eligible boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this conservation practice qualifies for carbon credit or greenhouse gas offset programs (e.g., cover crops, no-till, agroforestry) under ISCC or voluntary carbon market standards.']
  certification_date date [note: 'Date on which the conservation practice was officially certified as meeting USDA NRCS or program standards by the certifying agency.']
  certifying_agency varchar [note: 'Name of the agency or organization that certified the conservation practice as meeting applicable standards (e.g., USDA NRCS, state department of agriculture, third-party certifier, GLOBALG.A.P.).']
  certifying_agent_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual NRCS agent, conservation district employee, or third-party certifier who performed the practice certification inspection.']
  cost_share_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Dollar amount of government cost-share payment received or approved for this conservation practice under the applicable USDA program. Expressed in USD.']
  cost_share_contract_number varchar [note: 'Official USDA NRCS or FSA contract number associated with the cost-share program agreement funding this conservation practice. Used for program compliance tracking and payment reconciliation.']
  cost_share_program varchar [note: 'USDA cost-share or incentive program funding this conservation practice: EQIP (Environmental Quality Incentives Program), CSP (Conservation Stewardship Program), RCPP (Regional Conservation Partnership Program), ACEP (Agricultural Conservation Easement Program), REAP (Rural Energy for America Program), or none for self-funded practices.']
  county_code varchar [note: 'Three-digit FIPS county code identifying the county where the conservation practice is located. Used for USDA NRCS county office routing and program administration.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this conservation practice record was first created in the system, supporting data lineage, audit trail, and ISO 14001 environmental management documentation requirements.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which the conservation practice lifespan ends or the cost-share program contract expires, after which the practice status transitions to expired.']
  fsma_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this conservation practice supports compliance with the FDA Food Safety Modernization Act (FSMA) Produce Safety Rule requirements, particularly for water quality and soil amendment practices.']
  gis_feature_code varchar [note: 'Esri ArcGIS feature identifier linking this conservation practice record to its spatial geometry (polygon, polyline, or point) in the GIS layer for mapping and spatial analysis.']
  installation_date date [note: 'Date on which the conservation practice was physically installed or implemented on the field or parcel.']
  iso14001_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the ISO 14001 Environmental Management System clause or environmental objective that this conservation practice supports (e.g., clause 6.1.2 Environmental Aspects, clause 8.1 Operational Planning).']
  last_maintenance_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent maintenance activity performed on this conservation practice to ensure continued effectiveness and compliance with NRCS practice standards.']
  latitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'GPS latitude coordinate of the practice centroid or reference point in decimal degrees (WGS84), captured via RTK (Real-Time Kinematic) positioning for precision location tracking.']
  longitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'GPS longitude coordinate of the practice centroid or reference point in decimal degrees (WGS84), captured via RTK (Real-Time Kinematic) positioning for precision location tracking.']
  maintenance_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this conservation practice requires scheduled maintenance activities (e.g., annual inspection, vegetation management, structural repair) to maintain its effectiveness and program compliance.']
  next_maintenance_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next required maintenance inspection or activity for this conservation practice, supporting proactive maintenance planning and program compliance.']
  organic_program_eligible boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this conservation practice is compatible with and supports USDA National Organic Program (NOP) certification requirements for organic production systems.']
  planned_start_date date [note: 'Scheduled start date for the conservation practice as agreed in the cost-share program contract or farm conservation plan.']
  practice_area_acres decimal(10,4) [note: 'Total area covered by the conservation practice measured in acres. Used for area-based practices such as cover crops, filter strips, and nutrient management plans.']
  practice_category varchar [note: 'USDA NRCS classification category grouping the conservation practice by discipline: agronomy (soil/crop management), engineering (structural), forestry, range, or wildlife.']
  practice_code varchar [note: 'Official USDA Natural Resources Conservation Service (NRCS) practice standard code identifying the type of conservation practice (e.g., 340 Cover Crop, 412 Grassed Waterway, 590 Nutrient Management, 393 Filter Strip, 484 Mulching).']
  practice_effectiveness_rating varchar [note: 'Qualitative assessment of the conservation practice effectiveness in addressing the targeted resource concern, as evaluated during NRCS certification or periodic review (high, medium, low, not_evaluated).']
  practice_lifespan_years varchar [note: 'Expected operational lifespan of the conservation practice in years as defined by USDA NRCS practice standards (e.g., cover crop annual, grassed waterway 10 years, terrace 25 years).']
  practice_linear_feet decimal(10,2) [note: 'Length of the conservation practice measured in linear feet. Used for linear practices such as grassed waterways, filter strips, riparian buffers, and terraces.']
  practice_name varchar [note: 'Official USDA NRCS descriptive name of the conservation practice corresponding to the practice code (e.g., Cover Crop, Grassed Waterway, Nutrient Management Plan, Filter Strip).']
  practice_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional operational notes, site-specific conditions, deviations from standard specifications, or observations recorded during installation or certification of the conservation practice.']
  practice_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the conservation practice: planned (approved but not yet installed), installed (physically implemented), certified (verified by certifying agency), expired (past lifespan or contract end), or cancelled (discontinued before completion).']
  producer_cost decimal(12,2) [note: 'Net cost borne by the producer after deducting cost-share payments from total practice cost. Calculated as total_practice_cost minus cost_share_amount. Supports farm financial planning and CAPEX/OPEX reporting.']
  resource_concern varchar [note: 'USDA NRCS-defined resource concern that this conservation practice addresses (e.g., soil erosion by water, soil erosion by wind, excess nutrients in surface water, degraded plant condition). Aligns with NRCS Resource Concern Inventory.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two-letter US state abbreviation where the conservation practice is located, used for USDA NRCS state office routing, program eligibility, and regulatory reporting.']
  total_practice_cost decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total actual cost incurred to install and implement the conservation practice, including materials, labor, and equipment. Used to calculate net producer cost after cost-share payments.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit of measure used to quantify the conservation practice extent (acres for area-based, linear_feet for linear structures, each for discrete installations, cubic_yards for earthwork, square_feet for small structures).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to this conservation practice record, supporting audit trail, data lineage, and change tracking for program compliance reporting.']

  Note: 'Record of conservation and BMP (Best Management Practice) practices implemented on a field or parcel. Captures USDA NRCS practice code (e.g., 340 Cover Crop, 412 Grassed Waterway, 590 Nutrient Management), practice name, installation date, practice area (acres/linear feet), cost-share program (EQIP, CSP, RCPP), cost-share amount ($), practice lifespan (years), certification date, certifying agency, ISO 14001 environmental management reference, and practice status (planned/installed/certified/expired). Supports USDA NRCS program compliance and environmental stewardship reporting.'
}

Table land.irrigation_zone {
  irrigation_zone_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the irrigation zone or subsurface drainage zone record. Primary key for this entity.']
  field_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the agricultural field parcel to which this irrigation or drainage zone belongs. Provides spatial context linking the zone to its parent land unit.']
  management_zone_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to land.management_zone. Business justification: An irrigation zone (water delivery and drainage infrastructure zone) frequently aligns with or is bounded by a management zone (soil-based VRA delineation). Linking irrigation_zone to management_zone ']
  water_right_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the water right entitlement record governing the permitted water withdrawal volume for this irrigation zone. Supports regulatory compliance with state water authority permit requirements.']
  application_efficiency_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Ratio of water beneficially used by the crop to the total water applied by the irrigation system, expressed as a percentage. Key performance indicator for water use efficiency benchmarking against USDA NRCS and GLOBALG.A.P. standards.']
  bmp_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this irrigation or drainage zone is currently operating in compliance with applicable Best Management Practices (BMP) for water management as defined by USDA NRCS and state environmental agencies. Supports ISO 14001 environmental compliance reporting.']
  conservation_practice_code varchar [note: 'USDA NRCS Conservation Practice Standard code associated with this water management zone (e.g., 441 for Irrigation System, Microirrigation; 606 for Subsurface Drain). Used for EQIP (Environmental Quality Incentives Program) payment eligibility and conservation compliance reporting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this irrigation zone record was first created in the system, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Supports data lineage, audit trail, and Silver Layer ingestion tracking in the Databricks Lakehouse.']
  design_application_rate_in_hr decimal(6,3) [note: 'Engineered water application rate of the irrigation system expressed in inches per hour. Used to match application rate to soil infiltration capacity to prevent runoff and ensure uniform distribution. Sourced from system design specifications.']
  drainage_area_acres decimal(10,3) [note: 'Total land area served by the subsurface tile drainage system in this zone, measured in acres. Used for drainage coefficient calculations, drainage district permit compliance, and BMP reporting. Applicable when zone_type = \'subsurface_drainage\'.']
  drainage_coefficient_in_day decimal(5,3) [note: 'Design drainage rate of the subsurface tile system expressed in inches of water removed per day. Determines system capacity to handle peak rainfall events and maintain trafficable field conditions. Applicable when zone_type = \'subsurface_drainage\'.']
  drainage_district_permit_ref varchar [note: 'Permit number or reference code issued by the local drainage district authority governing the subsurface tile drainage system. Required for regulatory compliance and environmental reporting. Applicable when zone_type = \'subsurface_drainage\'.']
  et_scheduling_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this irrigation zone uses Evapotranspiration (ET)-based scheduling to determine irrigation timing and volume. ET-based scheduling integrates weather data and crop coefficients to optimize water use efficiency.']
  gis_boundary_ref varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or layer name for the zone boundary polygon stored in Esri ArcGIS. Enables spatial analysis, overlap detection, and RTK-accurate field mapping for precision water management.']
  installation_contractor varchar [note: 'Name of the contractor or company that installed the irrigation system or subsurface tile drainage system. Used for warranty claims, maintenance coordination, and capital expenditure (CAPEX) documentation.']
  installation_cost_usd decimal(14,2) [note: 'Total capital expenditure (CAPEX) incurred for the installation of the irrigation or drainage system, expressed in US dollars. Used for asset valuation, depreciation calculations, and ROI analysis in SAP S/4HANA FI-AA and Granular Farm Management financial planning.']
  installation_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year in which the irrigation or drainage system was installed. Used for asset age tracking, depreciation scheduling, and infrastructure replacement planning in SAP S/4HANA Fixed Assets.']
  irrigated_area_acres decimal(10,3) [note: 'Total land area served by this irrigation zone measured in acres. Used for permitted volume compliance calculations, water use efficiency reporting, and USDA Farm Service Agency (FSA) acreage reporting.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent physical inspection of the irrigation or drainage system infrastructure. Used to track maintenance compliance intervals and trigger inspection work orders in SAP S/4HANA PM.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text operational notes or remarks about the irrigation or drainage zone, including known issues, special operating conditions, or historical context not captured in structured fields. Used by farm managers and agronomists in Granular Farm Management.']
  permitted_volume_acre_ft decimal(12,3) [note: 'Maximum annual water withdrawal volume authorized under the associated water right permit, expressed in acre-feet. Compliance ceiling for seasonal irrigation scheduling and water use reporting to state water authorities.']
  soil_moisture_sensor_count varchar [note: 'Number of soil moisture sensor locations deployed within this irrigation zone for real-time soil water status monitoring. Supports IoT-driven precision irrigation scheduling via John Deere Operations Center integration.']
  soil_moisture_sensor_locations varchar [note: 'GPS coordinate string or GIS reference describing the placement locations of soil moisture sensors within the zone (e.g., WKT MULTIPOINT or comma-separated lat/lon pairs). Supports precision water management and IoT sensor mapping in Esri ArcGIS.']
  system_condition varchar [note: 'Current physical condition assessment of the irrigation or drainage infrastructure. Drives maintenance prioritization, capital replacement planning, and OEE reporting in SAP S/4HANA PM and John Deere Operations Center.']
  system_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the irrigation delivery system technology installed in this zone. Determines application efficiency benchmarks, scheduling parameters, and maintenance requirements. Applicable when zone_type = \'irrigation\'. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: center_pivot|drip|flood|subsurface_drip|linear_move|traveling_gun — promote to reference product if additional types are needed]']
  tile_depth_inches decimal(6,2) [note: 'Installation depth of the subsurface drainage tile below the soil surface in inches. Affects drainage effectiveness, frost protection, and interaction with soil horizons. Applicable when zone_type = \'subsurface_drainage\'.']
  tile_diameter_inches decimal(5,2) [note: 'Internal diameter of the subsurface drainage tile pipe in inches. Determines hydraulic capacity and drainage coefficient. Used for system capacity calculations and replacement planning. Applicable when zone_type = \'subsurface_drainage\'.']
  tile_map_gis_ref varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or layer name for the subsurface tile drainage map stored in Esri ArcGIS. Enables spatial visualization of tile layout, outlet locations, and drainage area boundaries for BMP planning and contractor coordination.']
  tile_material varchar [note: 'Material composition of the subsurface drainage tile pipe installed in this zone. Corrugated plastic/HDPE is the modern standard; clay and concrete are legacy materials found in older installations. Applicable when zone_type = \'subsurface_drainage\'.']
  tile_outlet_latitude decimal(10,7) [note: 'GPS latitude coordinate of the subsurface tile drainage system outlet location in decimal degrees (WGS84). Used for field mapping in Esri ArcGIS and environmental monitoring of drainage discharge points. Applicable when zone_type = \'subsurface_drainage\'.']
  tile_outlet_longitude decimal(10,7) [note: 'GPS longitude coordinate of the subsurface tile drainage system outlet location in decimal degrees (WGS84). Used for field mapping in Esri ArcGIS and environmental monitoring of drainage discharge points. Applicable when zone_type = \'subsurface_drainage\'.']
  tile_system_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the subsurface tile drainage system layout installed in this zone. \'Pattern\' indicates systematic grid installation; \'random\' indicates targeted placement in wet spots; \'interceptor\' indicates placement to intercept lateral water flow. Applicable when zone_type = \'subsurface_drainage\'.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to this irrigation zone record, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Supports change data capture (CDC), audit compliance, and Silver Layer delta processing in the Databricks Lakehouse.']
  water_source_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the primary water supply source feeding this irrigation zone (e.g., groundwater well, surface river diversion, on-farm reservoir, irrigation canal). Critical for water right compliance and drought risk assessment. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: well|river|reservoir|canal|municipal|recycled — promote to reference product if additional sources are needed]']
  zone_status varchar [note: 'Current operational lifecycle status of the irrigation or drainage zone. Drives scheduling eligibility, maintenance planning, and asset reporting in SAP S/4HANA PM and John Deere Operations Center.']
  zone_type varchar [note: 'Discriminator indicating whether this zone record represents an irrigation delivery system or a subsurface tile drainage system. Drives which set of operational attributes are applicable for the zone.']

  Note: 'Spatial and operational record for all field-level water management infrastructure — the single source of truth for both irrigation delivery systems and subsurface tile drainage systems within a field. For irrigation: captures zone name, system type (center pivot, drip, flood, subsurface drip, linear move, traveling gun), water source (well, river, reservoir, canal), water right permit reference, permitted volume (acre-feet), irrigated acres, application efficiency (%), design application rate (in/hr), soil moisture sensor locations, and ET-based scheduling parameters. For subsurface drainage: captures tile system type (pattern, random, interceptor), tile material (clay, concrete, corrugated plastic/HDPE), tile diameter (inches), tile depth (inches), outlet location GPS, drainage area (acres), drainage coefficient (inches/day), tile map GIS reference, installation contractor, installation year, estimated cost, system condition (good/fair/poor), and drainage district permit reference. Integrates with John Deere Operations Center for precision water management. Links to field for spatial context and to water_right for entitlement compliance. SSOT for all field-level water infrastructure including both irrigation and drainage.'
}

Table land.farm_unit {
  farm_unit_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for the farm unit record in the land domain. Primary key for the farm_unit entity, serving as the top-level aggregation point in the land domain hierarchy (farm_unit → parcel → field).']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Farm units are operated by legal entities that are customer accounts. Agronomic service contracts, input supply agreements, FSA program enrollment, and crop marketing contracts all require linking the']
  commodity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.commodity. Business justification: FSA Farm Registration and crop insurance unit classification require farm units to reference the commodity master for their primary commodity. primary_commodity is a denormalized text field; a domain ']
  delivery_location_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.delivery_location. Business justification: Farm units have a primary commodity delivery destination (grain elevator, co-op, processor) used in harvest logistics, grain marketing contracts, and settlement. This default delivery location drives ']
  farm_manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Farm managers are employees; the denormalized farm_manager_name text field should be replaced with a proper FK to employee for org chart reporting, manager accountability, performance management, and ']
  farm_operation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to land.farm_operation. Business justification: A farm_unit (operational grouping of fields and parcels under a single management structure) belongs to a farm_operation (the overarching master business entity for the operation). This 1:N relationsh']
  territory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.territory. Business justification: Sales territory assignment for farm units drives sales rep routing, territory-based account management, and territory performance reporting. Ag sales managers expect each farm unit to be assigned to a']
  clu_identifier varchar [note: 'USDA FSA Common Land Unit (CLU) identifier linking this farm unit to the official USDA geospatial land unit registry. CLU is the smallest unit of land with a permanent, contiguous boundary used for FSA program administration and acreage reporting.']
  conservation_program_enrollment varchar [note: 'Name or code of USDA conservation programs in which this farm unit is enrolled (e.g., CRP, EQIP, CSP, RCPP). Supports BMP compliance tracking, conservation payment eligibility, and ISO 14001 environmental management reporting.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the country in which this farm unit operates (e.g., USA, CAN, BRA). Supports international operations, COOL (Country of Origin Labeling) compliance, and multi-country enterprise reporting.']
  county_name varchar [note: 'Name of the county in which the majority of this farm unit\'s land is located. Required for FSA county office assignment, crop insurance county-level rate determination, and USDA program administration.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this farm unit record was first created in the system. Supports data lineage, audit trail requirements, and SOX financial reporting controls.']
  crop_insurance_unit_number varchar [note: 'Risk Management Agency (RMA) assigned crop insurance unit number linking this farm unit to its crop insurance policy structure. Used for indemnity calculations, acreage reporting, and production history tracking under USDA RMA programs.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date on which this farm unit ceased operations or was retired from active management. Null for currently active farm units. Used for historical reporting, FSA record archival, and enterprise lifecycle management.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date on which this farm unit became operationally active and eligible for FSA program enrollment, crop insurance, and enterprise management. Marks the beginning of the farm unit\'s operational lifecycle.']
  erp_cost_center_code varchar [note: 'SAP S/4HANA CO module cost center code assigned to this farm unit for enterprise financial management, OPEX/CAPEX allocation, and profitability analysis. Links farm unit operations to the general ledger for enterprise budgeting.']
  erp_profit_center_code varchar [note: 'SAP S/4HANA CO module profit center code for this farm unit, enabling enterprise-level profitability analysis, EBITDA reporting, and ROI tracking at the farm unit level.']
  farm_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the farm unit by primary production system. Drives enterprise budgeting templates, crop insurance unit structuring, and FSA program eligibility. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: grain|livestock|mixed|specialty_crop|orchard|vegetable|aquaculture|dairy|poultry — promote to reference product if additional types are needed]']
  farm_unit_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name assigned to the farm unit, typically reflecting the operating entity or geographic identity of the farm (e.g., \'Sunrise Grain Farm\', \'Heartland Livestock Unit\'). Used in reporting, FSA program enrollment, and enterprise budgeting.']
  fmis_reference_code varchar [note: 'External reference identifier for this farm unit in the Farm Management Information System (FMIS), such as Granular Farm Management or Climate FieldView. Enables cross-system data integration and operational data lineage tracking.']
  fsa_county_code varchar [note: 'USDA FSA numeric county code for the county office administering this farm unit. Combined with FSA state code and farm number to form the complete FSA farm identifier for program enrollment and payment tracking.']
  fsa_farm_number varchar [note: 'USDA Farm Service Agency (FSA) assigned farm number uniquely identifying this farm unit within the FSA county office system. Required for FSA program enrollment, crop insurance unit structuring, and USDA program payment tracking.']
  fsa_state_code varchar [note: 'USDA FSA numeric state code assigned to the state where this farm unit is registered. Used in conjunction with FSA county code and farm number for unique FSA record identification and program payment routing.']
  fsa_tract_number varchar [note: 'USDA FSA tract number associated with this farm unit, identifying the contiguous block of land under common ownership or control within the FSA farm. Used for FSA program eligibility, acreage reporting, and USDA payment calculations.']
  gis_boundary_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or URL to the GIS polygon boundary layer for this farm unit in Esri ArcGIS or John Deere Operations Center. Enables RTK-accurate field mapping, GPS positioning, and spatial analytics for precision agriculture applications.']
  globalg_ap_number varchar [note: 'GLOBALG.A.P. certification number assigned to this farm unit, confirming compliance with global Good Agricultural Practices (GAP) standards. Required for export market access and retail supply chain qualification.']
  irrigation_type varchar [note: 'Primary irrigation method employed on this farm unit. Informs water resource management planning, evapotranspiration (ET) calculations, water use efficiency reporting, and USDA conservation program eligibility.']
  latitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic latitude coordinate (decimal degrees, WGS84) of the farm unit\'s centroid or primary reference point. Supports GIS mapping, GPS navigation, precision agriculture applications, and spatial analytics in Esri ArcGIS.']
  leased_acres decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total acres of land under cash rent or crop share lease agreements within this farm unit. Supports OPEX planning, lease liability reporting under IFRS 16/ASC 842, and FSA program eligibility determination.']
  longitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic longitude coordinate (decimal degrees, WGS84) of the farm unit\'s centroid or primary reference point. Supports GIS mapping, GPS navigation, precision agriculture applications, and spatial analytics in Esri ArcGIS.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for operational notes, special conditions, or contextual information about this farm unit not captured in structured fields. Used by farm managers and data stewards for supplemental documentation.']
  operational_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the farm unit indicating whether it is actively managed, temporarily inactive, under transition (e.g., organic conversion), or permanently retired from operation.']
  organic_certification_status varchar [note: 'Current USDA National Organic Program (NOP) certification status of the farm unit. Drives premium pricing, market channel eligibility, input restrictions, and compliance reporting requirements under USDA NOP regulations.']
  owned_acres decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total acres of land owned outright by the operating entity within this farm unit. Supports land asset valuation, CAPEX planning, and differentiation from leased land in enterprise financial reporting.']
  primary_watershed varchar [note: 'Name or HUC (Hydrologic Unit Code) of the primary watershed in which this farm unit is located. Used for EPA water quality compliance, BMP planning, conservation program eligibility, and environmental monitoring under ISO 14001.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two-letter US state abbreviation (USPS standard) for the state in which this farm unit is primarily located. Used for FSA state office routing, state-level regulatory compliance, and geographic reporting.']
  tillage_practice varchar [note: 'Predominant tillage practice employed on this farm unit. Supports soil health management, carbon sequestration reporting, BMP compliance, and USDA conservation program eligibility assessments.']
  total_operated_acres decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total land area operated by this farm unit in acres, encompassing both owned and leased parcels. Used for FSA acreage reporting, crop insurance unit sizing, enterprise budgeting, and USDA program payment calculations.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this farm unit record was last modified. Supports change tracking, data lineage, and audit trail requirements for FSA program compliance and SOX financial reporting controls.']

  Note: 'Operational farm unit grouping fields and parcels under a single management structure — typically corresponding to a USDA FSA farm number and tract number. Captures farm name, FSA farm number, FSA tract number, operating entity name, farm manager, total operated acres (owned + leased), county, state, primary commodity, farm type (grain, livestock, mixed, specialty crop), and operational status (active/inactive). Serves as the top-level aggregation point in the land domain hierarchy: farm_unit → parcel → field. Links to parcels for legal land identity and to fields for operational management. Used for FSA program enrollment, crop insurance unit structuring, enterprise budgeting, and USDA program payment tracking. One farm_unit may span multiple parcels and contain multiple fields. SSOT for the operational hierarchy that links fields and parcels to their managing entity.'
}

Table land.water_right {
  water_right_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated surrogate identifier for the water right record. Primary key for the water_right data product in the land domain.']
  holder_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Water rights are held by legal entities (accounts). Water right transfers, annual use reporting to state agencies, and curtailment notifications are directed to the holder account. Water rights can be']
  parcel_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the land parcel or farm unit to which this water right is appurtenant or associated. Links the water entitlement to the physical land asset.']
  annual_use_report_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the permit requires submission of an annual water use report to the issuing regulatory agency. True if mandatory reporting is required; False otherwise. Drives compliance calendar and reporting workflow.']
  annual_volume_acre_feet decimal(12,4) [note: 'Maximum volume of water authorized for diversion or extraction per calendar or water year, expressed in acre-feet. One acre-foot equals approximately 325,851 US gallons. This is the primary volumetric entitlement cap for compliance and water budget planning.']
  aquifer_name varchar [note: 'Name or designation of the groundwater aquifer from which extraction is authorized. Applicable for groundwater rights only. Used for aquifer management, depletion tracking, and state groundwater conservation district compliance.']
  certificate_document_ref varchar [note: 'Document management system reference or file path to the scanned water right certificate, permit, or decree. Enables retrieval of the original legal instrument for audit, compliance, and due diligence purposes.']
  curtailment_effective_date date [note: 'The date on which the current curtailment order became effective. Null if no curtailment is in effect. Used for operational planning and water supply risk management.']
  curtailment_status varchar [note: 'Current curtailment status indicating whether the regulatory authority has restricted or reduced authorized diversions due to drought, shortage, or senior right priority calls. Not_curtailed means full use is authorized; curtailed means diversion is prohibited; partially_curtailed means reduced diversion is allowed.']
  flow_rate_cfs decimal(10,4) [note: 'Maximum instantaneous diversion or extraction rate authorized under the water right, expressed in cubic feet per second (CFS). Governs the rate of water withdrawal at any given moment, distinct from the annual volume cap.']
  flow_rate_gpm decimal(10,4) [note: 'Maximum instantaneous diversion or extraction rate expressed in gallons per minute (GPM). Commonly used for groundwater well permits and pump specifications. Complements the CFS measure for operational pump management.']
  holder_type varchar [note: 'Legal entity classification of the water right holder. Determines applicable regulatory requirements, reporting obligations, and transfer restrictions under state water law.']
  irrigated_acres decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total acreage authorized for irrigation under this water right. Defines the maximum land area that may receive water from this entitlement. Used for water use efficiency calculations and USDA farm program compliance.']
  is_adjudicated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this water right has been formally adjudicated (confirmed by a court or administrative proceeding) as part of a general stream adjudication. Adjudicated rights have legally confirmed priority and volume.']
  is_transferable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this water right may be legally transferred, sold, or leased to another party under applicable state water law. True if transferable; False if appurtenant to the land and non-transferable.']
  issuing_agency varchar [note: 'Name of the governmental or regulatory authority that issued the water right permit or certificate (e.g., State Engineer\'s Office, State Water Resources Control Board, Bureau of Reclamation). Required for regulatory correspondence and compliance reporting.']
  issuing_state varchar [note: 'Two-letter US state code of the jurisdiction that issued the water right. Determines the applicable state water law doctrine (prior appropriation vs. riparian) and regulatory framework.']
  last_use_report_date date [note: 'Date on which the most recent annual water use report was submitted to the regulatory agency. Used to track reporting compliance and identify overdue filings.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional legal conditions, special permit stipulations, environmental mitigation requirements, or operational notes associated with this water right that are not captured in structured fields.']
  permit_expiry_date date [note: 'The date on which the water permit or certificate expires and must be renewed. Null for perpetual rights. Used for compliance calendar management and renewal workflow triggers.']
  permit_issue_date date [note: 'The date on which the water permit or certificate was officially issued by the issuing regulatory agency. May differ from the priority date in appropriative systems.']
  permit_number varchar [note: 'Externally-issued permit or certificate number assigned by the state water resource agency or regulatory authority. Serves as the official legal identifier for the water right on regulatory filings and compliance documentation.']
  permitted_use varchar [note: 'The authorized beneficial use category for which the water right was granted. Irrigation covers crop and field watering; livestock covers animal husbandry water supply; domestic covers on-farm household use; municipal, industrial, and recreational uses apply where applicable. Use must match actual application for compliance. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: irrigation|livestock|domestic|municipal|industrial|recreational|aquaculture|dust_suppression — promote to reference product if additional uses are needed]']
  place_of_use_description varchar [note: 'Legal description or narrative of the authorized place(s) where diverted or extracted water may be beneficially used. May reference legal land descriptions (township, range, section) or parcel identifiers. Restricts where water can be applied under the permit.']
  point_of_diversion_lat decimal(9,6) [note: 'GPS latitude coordinate (decimal degrees, WGS84) of the authorized point of diversion or extraction. Required for regulatory mapping, GIS integration with Esri ArcGIS, and field verification of diversion infrastructure.']
  point_of_diversion_lon decimal(9,6) [note: 'GPS longitude coordinate (decimal degrees, WGS84) of the authorized point of diversion or extraction. Required for regulatory mapping, GIS integration with Esri ArcGIS, and field verification of diversion infrastructure.']
  previous_holder_name varchar [note: 'Name of the entity or individual from whom this water right was most recently transferred. Supports chain-of-title documentation and transfer history for regulatory compliance.']
  priority_date date [note: 'The legally established date that determines the seniority of this water right relative to other rights on the same water source. Under prior appropriation doctrine, earlier priority dates have superior claim during shortage conditions. Critical for western-state water allocation compliance.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this water right record was first created in the system. Supports data lineage, audit trail, and Silver layer ingestion tracking in the Databricks Lakehouse.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this water right record was most recently modified. Supports change detection, incremental processing, and audit trail requirements in the Databricks Lakehouse Silver layer.']
  right_type varchar [note: 'Legal classification of the water right doctrine under which the entitlement is held. Surface rights derive from surface water bodies; groundwater rights pertain to aquifer extraction; riparian rights attach to land adjacent to a water body; appropriative rights follow prior appropriation doctrine (first-in-time, first-in-right) common in western US states; prescriptive rights arise from long-term use. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: surface|groundwater|riparian|appropriative|prescriptive|adjudicated — promote to reference product if additional types are needed]']
  season_end_date date [note: 'The calendar date on which authorized water diversion or use must cease each year under seasonal restrictions of the permit. Null if the right has no seasonal restriction.']
  season_start_date date [note: 'The calendar date on which authorized water diversion or use may begin each year under seasonal restrictions of the permit. Null if the right has no seasonal restriction.']
  source_water_body varchar [note: 'Name of the surface water body (river, stream, canal, reservoir, lake) or groundwater basin from which water is authorized to be diverted or extracted. Required for source identification in regulatory filings and environmental monitoring.']
  source_water_body_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the water source type. Distinguishes surface water sources (river, stream, canal, reservoir, lake, spring) from groundwater sources (aquifer) for regulatory categorization and environmental impact assessment. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: river|stream|canal|reservoir|lake|spring|aquifer — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  transfer_date date [note: 'The date on which ownership or appurtenance of this water right was most recently transferred to the current holder. Null if no transfer has occurred. Supports transfer history tracking and chain-of-title documentation.']
  water_district varchar [note: 'Name of the irrigation district, water conservation district, or water management area within which this water right is administered. Relevant for district-level allocation, assessment fees, and delivery scheduling.']
  water_right_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the water right. Active indicates the right is valid and in use; inactive indicates the right is held but not currently exercised; transferred indicates ownership or appurtenance has changed; forfeited indicates the right has been lost due to non-use or regulatory action; suspended indicates temporary regulatory hold.']
  well_depth_ft decimal(8,2) [note: 'Total drilled depth of the extraction well in feet below ground surface. Applicable for groundwater rights. Used for aquifer characterization, pump sizing, and regulatory well construction compliance.']
  well_registration_number varchar [note: 'Official registration or permit number assigned to the extraction well by the state well permitting authority. Applicable for groundwater rights. Links the water right to the physical well infrastructure for compliance and inspection records.']

  Note: 'Legal water right and permit record documenting authorized water use entitlements associated with parcels or farm units. Captures permit number, issuing agency, priority date, right type (surface, groundwater, riparian, appropriative), permitted use, volume (acre-feet/year), flow rate (CFS/GPM), source water body, well registration, aquifer, status (active/inactive/transferred/forfeited), and transfer history. SSOT for water entitlement compliance — critical for western-state prior appropriation doctrine and state water resource regulation.'
}

Table land.farm_operation {
  farm_operation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for farm_operation']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Farm operations are customer-facing legal entities requiring direct account linkage for sales order processing, agronomic service agreements, and regulatory filings (FSA, NRCS). A domain expert expect']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the primary operator or owner responsible for managing this farm operation.']
  parent_farm_operation_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on farm_operation (parent_farm_operation_id)']
  primary_commodity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.commodity. Business justification: farm_operation.primary_commodity is a plain-text denormalization of the commodity entity. FSA registration, crop insurance enrollment, and operation-level market reporting require a proper FK to commo']
  bmp_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance status with agricultural best management practices for environmental stewardship.']
  centroid_latitude decimal(10,7) [note: 'Geographic latitude coordinate of the farm operation centroid in decimal degrees, using WGS84 datum.']
  centroid_longitude decimal(10,7) [note: 'Geographic longitude coordinate of the farm operation centroid in decimal degrees, using WGS84 datum.']
  conservation_plan_date date [note: 'Date when the current conservation plan was approved or last updated.']
  conservation_plan_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the farm conservation plan required for environmental compliance and best management practices.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for the country where the farm operation is located.']
  county_fips_code varchar [note: 'Five-digit FIPS code identifying the county where the farm operation is primarily located.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this farm operation record was first created in the system.']
  cultivated_acreage decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total acreage actively used for crop cultivation within the farm operation.']
  established_date date [note: 'Date when the farm operation was originally established or registered.']
  gis_boundary_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier linking to the GIS-mapped field boundary polygon in ArcGIS or spatial database systems.']
  irrigation_system_type varchar [note: 'Primary type of irrigation system used on the farm operation, if applicable.']
  iso_14001_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the farm operation holds ISO 14001 environmental management system certification.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent regulatory or compliance inspection conducted on the farm operation.']
  legal_entity_type varchar [note: 'Legal structure under which the farm operation is organized and registered.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this farm operation record was last modified or updated.']
  next_inspection_due_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next regulatory or compliance inspection of the farm operation.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, comments, or special considerations related to the farm operation.']
  operation_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique business identifier or registration code for the farm operation, often used in regulatory filings and government programs.']
  operation_name varchar [note: 'The official business name or designation of the farm operation.']
  operation_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the farm operation in its lifecycle.']
  operation_type varchar [note: 'Primary classification of the farm operation based on its main agricultural activity.']
  organic_certification_number varchar [note: 'Official certification number issued by the organic certifying agency, if applicable.']
  organic_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the farm operation holds valid organic certification from an accredited certifying body.']
  ownership_type varchar [note: 'Primary ownership or tenure arrangement for the land managed by this farm operation.']
  precision_agriculture_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the farm operation utilizes precision agriculture technologies such as GPS guidance, variable rate application, or yield monitoring.']
  registration_date date [note: 'Date when the farm operation was registered in the system or with regulatory authorities.']
  rtk_gps_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the farm operation uses RTK-accurate GPS positioning for field operations and mapping.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two-letter postal abbreviation for the state where the farm operation is located.']
  tax_identification_number varchar [note: 'Federal tax identification number (EIN or SSN) associated with the farm operation for tax reporting purposes.']
  total_acreage decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total land area in acres managed by this farm operation, including cultivated, pasture, and non-productive land.']
  water_source_type varchar [note: 'Primary source of water used for irrigation and farm operations.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for farm_operation. Referenced by farm_operation_id.'
}

Table equipment.asset {
  asset_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated surrogate key identifying each agricultural equipment or fleet asset record in the master registry. Primary key for the asset data product.']
  asset_category_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the asset class/category reference product defining the equipment classification hierarchy (e.g., tractor, combine harvester, planter, sprayer, irrigation system, precision agriculture hardware).']
  capital_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.capital_project. Business justification: Equipment acquisitions in agriculture are funded through approved CAPEX projects (e.g., combine fleet renewal, precision ag hardware rollout). Linking asset to its funding capital_project enables CAPE']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: In multi-entity agriculture operations (holding company with subsidiary farms), each asset must be assigned to a legal entity (company code) for statutory reporting, insurance, and intercompany asset ']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'FK to finance.cost_center']
  facility_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.facility. Business justification: Assets such as grain augers, conveyors, and forklifts are permanently stationed at supply facilities (grain elevators, packing houses). Asset management and maintenance routing requires knowing the ho']
  farm_operation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to land.farm_operation. Business justification: Farm operation-level fleet inventory, depreciation scheduling, and capital asset reporting are standard agricultural accounting requirements. The farm_operation is the legal entity that owns equipment']
  farm_unit_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the farm or agricultural operation to which this asset is primarily assigned for operational and cost allocation purposes.']
  fixed_asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fixed_asset. Business justification: Farm equipment (tractors, combines, irrigation systems) are capitalized on the fixed asset register. This link enables asset register reconciliation, depreciation tracking (MACRS/Section 179), and GAA']
  loan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.loan. Business justification: Farm equipment is routinely financed via FSA or commercial loans. Linking asset to the financing loan supports collateral tracking, loan covenant compliance monitoring, and asset disposal decisions th']
  parcel_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to land.parcel. Business justification: Fixed assets (irrigation pivots, grain bins, buildings) are legally attached to a specific land parcel for property tax assessment, title records, and insurance purposes. Fixed asset registers in agri']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Agriculture assets (tractors, combines, irrigation systems) are assigned to profit centers (grain, livestock, horticulture) for segment profitability reporting and IFRS 8 segment disclosure. A domain ']
  acquisition_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Original purchase price or total capitalized cost of the asset at acquisition, representing the Capital Expenditure (CAPEX) investment. Includes purchase price, freight, installation, and commissioning costs. Denominated in USD. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA FI/AM.']
  acquisition_date date [note: 'Date on which the asset was acquired (purchased, leased, or transferred into the fleet). Marks the start of the asset lifecycle for depreciation, warranty, and compliance tracking. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA FI/AM module.']
  asset_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable descriptive name or designation for the asset (e.g., \'John Deere 8R 410 Tractor - North Field Unit 3\'). Used for operational identification and reporting.']
  commissioning_date date [note: 'Date on which the asset was formally placed into service and became operational. May differ from acquisition date if installation, calibration, or certification was required prior to first use. Triggers start of depreciation in SAP S/4HANA.']
  current_book_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Current net book value of the asset after accumulated depreciation, calculated as acquisition cost minus total accumulated depreciation to date. Used for financial reporting, insurance valuation, and disposal decisions. Denominated in USD.']
  decommission_date date [note: 'Date on which the asset was formally retired from service and decommissioned. Marks the end of the operational lifecycle for depreciation cessation, disposal processing, and regulatory reporting. Null if asset is still active.']
  depreciation_method varchar [note: 'Accounting method used to calculate periodic depreciation of the asset. Straight-line spreads cost evenly; declining balance accelerates early depreciation; units of production ties depreciation to actual usage hours. Configured in SAP S/4HANA FI/AM.']
  engine_hours decimal(10,1) [note: 'Cumulative total engine or operating hours recorded on the asset since manufacture or last major overhaul. Primary usage metric for maintenance scheduling (e.g., 250-hour, 500-hour service intervals), depreciation under units-of-production method, and Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) calculation. Sourced from John Deere Operations Center telematics.']
  engine_power_kw decimal(8,2) [note: 'Rated engine power output of the asset in kilowatts (kW) as specified by the manufacturer. Used for equipment capability matching to field operations, fuel consumption benchmarking, and EPA emissions classification.']
  fuel_type varchar [note: 'Type of fuel or energy source used by the asset. Relevant for fuel cost allocation, emissions reporting (EPA Tier 4 Final compliance), and sustainability tracking under ISCC and ISO 14001 environmental management standards.']
  gps_rtk_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the asset is equipped with a Global Positioning System (GPS) / Real-Time Kinematic (RTK) positioning receiver for precision agriculture operations including Variable Rate Application (VRA), auto-steer, and field mapping. True = RTK-capable; False = no precision positioning hardware.']
  insurance_expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the current insurance policy for the asset expires. Triggers renewal workflow to ensure continuous coverage and compliance with financing covenants and regulatory requirements.']
  insurance_policy_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the insurance policy covering this asset against loss, damage, or liability. Used for claims processing, risk management reporting, and compliance with lender insurance requirements for financed equipment.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent formal safety or regulatory inspection performed on the asset. Used to track compliance with OSHA equipment safety standards, GLOBALG.A.P. equipment hygiene requirements, and internal audit schedules.']
  lifecycle_stage varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle stage of the asset per ISO 55000 asset management framework. Drives maintenance scheduling, capital planning, and disposal workflows. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: acquisition|commissioning|operational|standby|maintenance|decommissioned|disposed — promote to reference product]']
  make varchar [note: 'Name of the original equipment manufacturer (OEM) of the asset (e.g., John Deere, Case IH, AGCO, Kubota, Trimble). Used for vendor management, parts sourcing, and warranty claims.']
  model varchar [note: 'Manufacturer model designation of the asset (e.g., \'8R 410\', \'X9 1100\', \'R4045\'). Combined with make and year to uniquely identify the equipment specification for parts compatibility and performance benchmarking.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Manufacturer model year of the asset (e.g., 2022). Used for depreciation scheduling, technology generation classification, and compliance with emissions standards (EPA Tier 4 Final).']
  next_service_date date [note: 'Date on which the next preventive maintenance (PM) service is scheduled for the asset based on the Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS) schedule. Derived from last service date plus service interval. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA PM module maintenance plans.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional operational notes, special configuration details, known defects, or other relevant information about the asset that does not fit structured fields. Used by fleet managers and maintenance technicians for contextual documentation.']
  odometer_km decimal(10,1) [note: 'Cumulative distance traveled by the asset in kilometers, applicable to self-propelled vehicles (tractors, combines, sprayers, transport vehicles). Used for road-transport maintenance scheduling and fleet management. Sourced from John Deere Operations Center or vehicle ECU. Null for stationary or non-motorized equipment.']
  operational_status varchar [note: 'Current operational readiness status of the asset indicating whether it is available for field deployment. Active = deployed and operational; Standby = available but not deployed; Under Repair = in maintenance; Out of Service = unavailable; Decommissioned = retired from service.']
  ownership_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the asset\'s ownership or financing arrangement. Owned = outright purchase (CAPEX); Leased = finance or operating lease (OPEX/IFRS 16); Rented = short-term hire; Contract Hire = long-term managed service. Drives financial treatment under GAAP/IFRS 16.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the asset master record was first created in the system. Supports audit trail requirements, data lineage tracking, and SOX financial reporting controls. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the asset master record was most recently modified. Supports change tracking, audit trail requirements, and Silver Layer incremental load processing in the Databricks Lakehouse. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  registration_expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the current government or regulatory registration for the asset expires. Triggers renewal workflow to maintain legal compliance for road use and regulatory inspections.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Government or regulatory authority registration number for the asset where required (e.g., state DMV registration for road-going vehicles, USDA/APHIS equipment registration). Null for non-registered implements.']
  salvage_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated residual or salvage value of the asset at the end of its useful life. Used as the basis for depreciation calculations under straight-line and declining balance methods. Denominated in USD.']
  serial_number varchar [note: 'Manufacturer-assigned unique serial number for the equipment unit. Used for warranty tracking, recall management, and manufacturer service records. Key identifier in John Deere Operations Center.']
  tag varchar [note: 'Internally assigned physical asset tag or barcode label affixed to the equipment for inventory tracking and identification during audits and maintenance. Aligns with SAP S/4HANA PM asset tag field.']
  telematics_device_code varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the telematics device or machine connectivity unit installed on the asset and registered in the John Deere Operations Center platform. Enables real-time GPS tracking, remote diagnostics, fuel consumption monitoring, and field data synchronization.']
  useful_life_years varchar [note: 'Estimated useful economic life of the asset in years, used as the basis for straight-line depreciation calculations and capital replacement planning. Defined at acquisition per GAAP/IFRS guidelines.']
  vin varchar [note: '17-character Vehicle Identification Number assigned to motorized agricultural vehicles (tractors, combines, self-propelled sprayers) per ISO 3779 standard. Null for non-motorized implements.']
  vra_controller_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the asset is equipped with a Variable Rate Application (VRA) controller enabling prescription-based variable rate seeding, fertilization, or chemical application. Supports precision agriculture workflows in Trimble Ag Software and Climate FieldView.']
  warranty_expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the manufacturer or dealer warranty for the asset expires. Used to trigger preventive maintenance scheduling under warranty terms and to determine whether repair costs are chargeable to the vendor or internal Operational Expenditure (OPEX) budget.']

  Note: 'Master registry of all agricultural equipment and fleet assets including tractors, combines, planters, sprayers, irrigation systems, and precision agriculture hardware. Captures asset identification (serial number, VIN, asset tag), make, model, year, asset class/category reference, acquisition date, acquisition cost (CAPEX), current book value, depreciation method, operational status (active/standby/decommissioned), assigned farm/field, GPS/RTK integration flag, telematics device ID (John Deere Operations Center), ISO 55000 lifecycle stage, salvage value, and regulatory compliance certifications. SSOT for all equipment identity, registration, and financial summary data. Central master record referenced by all transactional products in the equipment domain.'
}

Table equipment.asset_category {
  asset_category_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for each asset category record in the equipment classification hierarchy. Primary key for the asset_category reference table. [REFERENCE_LOOKUP role — canonical_skip_reason: This entity is a reference classification hierarchy / taxonomy table defining equipment types; per-role minimums for REFERENCE_LOOKUP are exempt, but MASTER_RESOURCE minimums are applied as best-fit given the entity carries rich descriptive, financial, and operational metadata beyond a simple code list.]']
  parent_category_asset_category_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing identifier pointing to the parent category in the equipment classification hierarchy, enabling parent-child rollup reporting for CAPEX/OPEX budgeting and fleet planning. Null for top-level (root) categories.']
  asset_tag_prefix varchar [note: 'Standardized alphabetic prefix used when generating asset tag numbers for individual assets registered under this category (e.g., \'TRC\' for tractors, \'CMB\' for combines, \'SPR\' for sprayers). Ensures consistent asset identification across the enterprise fleet registry.']
  availability_target_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target equipment availability rate (uptime as a percentage of scheduled operating time) for assets in this category, forming the availability component of the OEE calculation. Used in preventive maintenance scheduling and fleet planning to set maintenance frequency targets.']
  capex_budget_account_code varchar [note: 'General Ledger (GL) account code in SAP S/4HANA FI/CO to which capital expenditure for assets in this category is posted. Enables CAPEX budget tracking and variance reporting by equipment category. Aligned with GAAP/IFRS financial reporting chart of accounts.']
  category_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the equipment category within the enterprise taxonomy (e.g., TILL-001, PLANT-002, SPRAY-003). Used as the business key in SAP S/4HANA PM asset class configuration and cross-system integration with John Deere Operations Center fleet telematics.']
  category_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the equipment category, including its primary agricultural function, typical use cases, and operational context (e.g., tillage, planting, crop protection, harvesting, irrigation, livestock handling, precision ag hardware, transport fleet).']
  category_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name of the equipment category (e.g., \'Row Crop Tractor\', \'Combine Harvester\', \'Center Pivot Irrigation System\', \'Precision Ag RTK Receiver\'). Used in CAPEX/OPEX budgeting reports, fleet planning dashboards, and maintenance scheduling interfaces.']
  category_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the asset category record. \'active\' indicates the category is in use for asset registration and fleet planning; \'deprecated\' indicates the category has been superseded and no new assets should be assigned; \'under_review\' indicates pending taxonomy governance approval.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this asset category record was first created in the system. Supports data lineage, audit trail, and taxonomy governance tracking. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  depreciation_method varchar [note: 'Standard depreciation calculation method applied to assets in this category for financial reporting purposes. Drives SAP S/4HANA FI-AA depreciation key assignment. Aligned with IFRS IAS 16 and GAAP ASC 360 requirements for agricultural equipment asset accounting.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date from which this asset category definition becomes effective and valid for use in asset registration, budgeting, and fleet planning. Supports temporal validity management of the equipment taxonomy for historical reporting and audit trails.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date after which this asset category definition is no longer valid for new asset registrations. Null indicates the category is open-ended with no planned expiry. Supports taxonomy versioning and deprecation management.']
  equipment_class varchar [note: 'Operational class of the equipment category aligned with core agricultural business processes (e.g., tillage, planting, spraying, harvesting, irrigation). Maps directly to John Deere Operations Center equipment class codes and SAP S/4HANA PM functional location structure. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: tillage|planting|spraying|harvesting|irrigation|fertilization|precision_ag|livestock|transport|general_purpose — promote to reference product]']
  equipment_domain varchar [note: 'High-level domain classification grouping equipment categories into major operational areas of the agricultural enterprise. Drives top-level CAPEX/OPEX budget segmentation and OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) benchmarking by domain. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: field_equipment|precision_ag_hardware|irrigation_systems|livestock_handling|transport_fleet|storage_infrastructure|power_units|other — promote to reference product if domain list expands beyond 8 values]']
  fuel_type varchar [note: 'Primary fuel or energy source type for assets in this category. Used for fuel consumption budgeting, OPEX cost allocation, emissions reporting, and EPA compliance tracking. \'none\' applies to non-powered implements (e.g., tillage tools, trailers). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: diesel|gasoline|electric|hybrid|lpg|natural_gas|none — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  globalg_ap_equipment_type varchar [note: 'Equipment type classification code as defined by GLOBALG.A.P. (Global Good Agricultural Practices) certification standards. Required for GLOBALG.A.P. audit documentation to demonstrate that equipment used in certified operations meets GAP (Good Agricultural Practices) requirements.']
  gps_telematics_capable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether assets in this category are equipped with or compatible with GPS/telematics hardware for real-time location tracking and operational data collection via John Deere Operations Center or equivalent fleet telematics platforms. True = telematics integration is standard for this category.']
  hierarchy_level varchar [note: 'Numeric depth of this category within the equipment taxonomy hierarchy (e.g., 1 = top-level domain such as \'Field Equipment\', 2 = class such as \'Harvesting Equipment\', 3 = type such as \'Combine Harvester\'). Supports rollup aggregation and drill-down analytics.']
  hierarchy_path varchar [note: 'Materialized path string representing the full ancestry of the category from root to current node (e.g., \'Field Equipment > Harvesting Equipment > Combine Harvester\'). Facilitates efficient tree traversal queries and breadcrumb navigation in fleet management UIs.']
  inspection_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Required frequency in calendar months between mandatory regulatory inspections for assets in this category (e.g., 12 months for annual EPA sprayer calibration, 6 months for OSHA-mandated safety checks). Null if inspection_required is False.']
  inspection_governing_body varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory authority or standards body responsible for mandating inspections for assets in this category (e.g., EPA, OSHA, USDA APHIS, FDA, state department of agriculture). Supports compliance tracking and audit documentation.']
