  workforce_certification_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.workforce_certification. Business justification: EPA and state regulations require restricted-use pesticide (RUP) dispensing to be authorized by a valid pesticide applicator certification. Linking goods_issue to the specific workforce_certification ']
  application_rate decimal(10,4) [note: 'Rate at which the agricultural input (fertilizer NPK, crop protection chemical, seed) was applied per unit area (e.g., kg/ha, L/ha, BU/acre). Used for IPM tracking, VRA prescription compliance verification, and MRL calculation.']
  application_rate_uom varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the application rate (e.g., KG_PER_HA for fertilizer, L_PER_HA for liquid chemicals, BU_PER_ACRE for seed). Required for VRA prescription compliance and MRL verification.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this goods issue record was first created in the system (audit trail). Distinct from issue_timestamp which captures the physical event time.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the cost valuation (e.g., USD, EUR, BRL). Supports multi-currency operations for international agricultural trading entities.']
  destination_reference varchar [note: 'Business identifier of the destination entity receiving the goods: field ID, pen number, customer delivery address code, production order number, or cost center code. Provides operational traceability to the point of consumption or application.']
  destination_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the destination receiving the issued goods: agricultural field (for input application), livestock pen (for feed issuance), customer (for sales delivery), production order, cost center (internal consumption), project, or scrap. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: field|pen|customer|production_order|cost_center|project|scrap — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  document_number varchar [note: 'The externally-known SAP material document number generated upon posting the goods issue (movement type 201, 261, 601, etc.). Serves as the primary business identifier for audit and traceability.']
  grn_number varchar [note: 'Goods Receipt Note (GRN) number from the originating inbound receipt, linking the goods issue back to the original procurement receipt for full supply chain traceability and COGS matching.']
  gtin varchar [note: 'GS1 Global Trade Item Number (GTIN-14) identifying the material at the trade item level. Supports supply chain traceability, MRL compliance verification, and FSMA Traceability Rule requirements.']
  is_gmo boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the issued material is a Genetically Modified Organism (GMO). Required for identity preservation programs, COOL (Country of Origin Labeling), EU GMO labeling regulations, and non-GMO certification compliance.']
  is_organic_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the issued material is certified organic under the USDA National Organic Program (NOP). Ensures organic integrity is maintained through the supply chain and prevents co-mingling with conventional materials.']
  issue_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the goods issue document: draft (not yet posted), posted (inventory deducted), reversed (corrected via reversal document), cancelled, or pending_approval (awaiting authorization for restricted materials).']
  issue_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The actual date and time the goods issue was posted and inventory was physically withdrawn or applied. This is the principal business event timestamp used for FIFO/FEFO depletion sequencing and COGS recognition.']
  material_description varchar [note: 'Human-readable description of the material being issued (e.g., \'Glyphosate 41% Herbicide\', \'Urea 46-0-0 Fertilizer\', \'Pioneer P1197AM Corn Seed\', \'Corn #2 Yellow Dent\').']
  movement_category varchar [note: 'Business-level classification of the goods issue purpose: shipment to customer, internal consumption, field application of agricultural inputs (seeds/NPK fertilizers/crop protection chemicals), livestock feed issuance, production order issue, quality sample, or inventory write-off. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: shipment|consumption|field_application|feed_issuance|production|sample|write_off — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  movement_type_code varchar [note: 'SAP MM movement type code governing the inventory transaction (e.g., 201=cost center consumption, 261=production order issue, 601=customer delivery, 281=project issue). Drives accounting entries and stock depletion logic.']
  phi_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the goods issue of a crop protection chemical complies with the Pre-Harvest Interval (PHI) — the minimum number of days required between last application and harvest. True = compliant; False = PHI violation requiring corrective action.']
  posting_date date [note: 'The accounting period date on which the goods issue is recognized in the general ledger for COGS allocation. May differ from issue_timestamp when backdating is required for period-end close.']
  production_order_number varchar [note: 'SAP Production Order number linked to this goods issue when materials are issued to a manufacturing or processing order (movement type 261). Supports production cost tracking and yield analysis.']
  quantity_issued decimal(18,4) [note: 'The quantity of material withdrawn from inventory in the primary unit of measure (UOM). This is the principal quantitative fact of the goods issue transaction.']
  quantity_issued_mt decimal(18,4) [note: 'Issued quantity normalized to Metric Tons (MT) for cross-commodity analytics, WASDE reporting alignment, and international trade compliance. Derived from quantity_issued and uom at ingestion.']
  rei_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the goods issue and field application of a pesticide complies with the Restricted Entry Interval (REI) per EPA Worker Protection Standard (WPS). True = compliant; False = REI violation requiring immediate safety response.']
  reversal_document_number varchar [note: 'SAP material document number of the reversal posting (movement type 202, 262, etc.) if this goods issue was reversed. Null if no reversal has been posted. Supports audit trail and inventory reconciliation.']
  total_cost_usd decimal(18,4) [note: 'Total COGS value of the goods issue (quantity_issued × unit_cost_usd). Used for cost center allocation, production order costing, and financial period-end close. Stored as a raw transactional value, not a derived KPI.']
  unit_cost_usd decimal(18,4) [note: 'Standard or moving average cost per unit of measure at the time of goods issue, used for COGS valuation. Sourced from SAP material valuation (standard price or MAP).']
  uom varchar [note: 'Primary unit of measure for the issued quantity. Agricultural commodities use CWT (Hundredweight), BU (Bushel), or MT (Metric Ton); chemicals/fertilizers use KG, LB, L, or GAL; seeds use BAG or EA. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: CWT|BU|MT|KG|LB|L|GAL|EA|BAG|TON — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to this goods issue record in the Silver Layer (e.g., status update, reversal flag, compliance flag recalculation). Supports data lineage and audit requirements.']
  wms_task_number varchar [note: 'Manhattan Associates WMS task or transfer order number associated with this goods issue, enabling end-to-end warehouse operation traceability from pick task to inventory deduction.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of all inventory withdrawals and outbound goods movements including shipments to customers, internal consumption, field application of agricultural inputs (seeds, fertilizers NPK, crop protection chemicals, feed), livestock feed issuance, and production orders. Captures goods issue document number, movement type (shipment, consumption, field_application, feed_issuance, production), material with GS1 GTIN/SSCC, lot, quantity in CWT/BU/MT, issuing location, destination or field/pen of application, operator, equipment used, VRA prescription reference, application rate, REI/PHI compliance flag per EPA WPS, cost center, sales order or production order reference, and SAP movement document. Serves as the SSOT for all inventory consumption including field input application. Supports FIFO/FEFO depletion, IPM tracking, MRL compliance per EU Regulation 396/2005 and Codex Alimentarius, and COGS allocation.'
}

  destination_plant_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.plant. This link enables contract fulf']
