  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this payment run record was last modified.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Internal notes or comments added by treasury or accounts payable staff regarding special handling, exceptions, or other operational details.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'The payment instrument or mechanism used for disbursements in this run (e.g., Automated Clearing House (ACH), wire transfer, physical check, Electronic Funds Transfer (EFT)).']
  payment_priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to this payment run for processing and cash management purposes. Urgent payments may require expedited approval and same-day execution.']
  payment_run_description varchar [note: 'Free-text description providing additional context about the purpose or scope of this payment run (e.g., \'Weekly vendor payments for harvest supplies\', \'Monthly grower settlements for corn crop\').']
  payment_run_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the payment run. Tracks progression from draft through approval, processing, and completion or cancellation.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Standard payment terms applied to this run (e.g., Net 30, Net 60, Immediate). Inherited from vendor master data but captured here for reporting consistency.']
  posting_date date [note: 'The accounting date on which the payment run transactions are posted to the General Ledger (GL). Used for period-end close and financial reporting.']
  reconciliation_date date [note: 'The date on which the payment run was reconciled with bank statements.']
  reconciliation_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the payment run has been reconciled against bank statements and whether any discrepancies were identified.']
  recurrence_pattern varchar [note: 'Describes the recurrence schedule if is_recurring is True (e.g., \'Weekly on Friday\', \'Monthly on 15th\', \'Bi-weekly\'). Null for ad-hoc runs.']
  run_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the payment run, formatted as PR-YYYYMMDD-NNNN for external reference and audit trails.']
  run_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the payment run based on payee category. Determines routing, approval workflows, and compliance requirements.']
  scheduled_date date [note: 'The date on which payments in this run are scheduled to be executed. Used for cash flow planning and vendor communication.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'The originating system or module that generated this payment run (e.g., SAP S/4HANA FI, Oracle NetSuite AP, custom grower settlement system).']
  total_deduction_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The sum of all deductions applied across payments in this run, including tax withholdings, advances, and other adjustments.']
  total_gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The sum of all gross payment amounts before any deductions, adjustments, or fees. Represents the total obligation to payees.']
  total_net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The sum of all net payment amounts after deductions. This is the actual cash outflow from the corporate bank account.']
  total_payment_count varchar [note: 'The total number of individual payment transactions included in this payment run.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for payment_run. Referenced by payment_run_id.'
}

Table finance.profit_center {
  profit_center_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for profit_center']
  commodity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.commodity. Business justification: Agricultural profit centers are organized around commodity lines (corn, soybeans, wheat, livestock). Linking profit_center to commodity_id enables commodity-level P&L reporting, segment reporting by c']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the legal entity company code under which this profit center operates for financial accounting purposes.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the default cost center associated with this profit center for overhead allocation and cost tracking.']
  parent_profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent profit center in the organizational hierarchy for roll-up reporting and consolidated financial analysis. Null for top-level profit centers.']
  primary_profit_created_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created this profit center record, used for audit trail and accountability.']
  tertiary_profit_last_modified_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last modified this profit center record, used for audit trail and accountability.']
  budget_allocation_method varchar [note: 'Method used to allocate corporate overhead and shared service costs to this profit center for budgeting and variance analysis.']
  closure_date date [note: 'Actual date when this profit center was closed or deactivated, preventing further financial postings. Null if still active.']
  closure_reason varchar [note: 'Business justification or reason for closing this profit center, used for audit trail and organizational change tracking.']
  cogs_allocation_basis varchar [note: 'Basis used to allocate cost of goods sold to this profit center for gross margin calculation and profitability analysis.']
  consolidation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this profit center is included in consolidated financial statements and regulatory filings.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code indicating the primary country of operation for this profit center, used for tax jurisdiction and regulatory compliance.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this profit center record was first created in the system, used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three-letter currency code representing the local operating currency for this profit center used in financial transactions and reporting.']
  geographic_region varchar [note: 'Geographic region or territory where this profit center operates, used for regional profitability analysis and market segmentation.']
  hierarchy_level varchar [note: 'Numeric level in the profit center organizational hierarchy, with 1 being the top consolidated level and higher numbers representing more granular operational units.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to this profit center record, used for change tracking and audit compliance.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-form text field for additional business context, special instructions, or operational notes related to this profit center.']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'External business identifier code for the profit center used in financial reporting and consolidation. Typically alphanumeric format aligned with chart of accounts structure.']
  profit_center_name varchar [note: 'Full business name of the profit center used for identification in financial statements and management reports.']
  profit_center_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the profit center indicating whether it is operational and available for financial postings.']
  profit_center_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the profit center by operational function within the agriculture business (e.g., crop production, livestock operations, processing facilities, distribution centers).']
  revenue_recognition_method varchar [note: 'Accounting method used to recognize revenue for this profit center in accordance with GAAP/IFRS standards and agriculture industry practices.']
  segment_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this profit center represents a reportable segment under ASC 280 or IFRS 8 segment reporting requirements.']
  short_name varchar [note: 'Abbreviated name or acronym for the profit center used in condensed reports and dashboards.']
  sox_control_scope boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this profit center is within the scope of Sarbanes-Oxley Act financial controls and audit requirements.']
  transfer_pricing_method varchar [note: 'Method used to price inter-company or inter-profit-center transactions for internal management reporting and tax compliance.']
  valid_from_date date [note: 'Date from which this profit center became active and available for financial postings and reporting.']
  valid_to_date date [note: 'Date until which this profit center remains active. Null indicates no planned end date. Used for historical analysis and period-based reporting.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for profit_center. Referenced by profit_center_id.'
}
